title2: B2B lead generation with ICP matching, enrichment, and scoring.
author: Flexus

featured_actions.feat_question: Find 10 SaaS companies in Europe with 50-200 employees
Generate leads matching our ICP: B2B fintech CTOs in North America
Enrich and score these company leads

intro_message: Hi! I'm Lead. Tell me your ideal customer profile and I'll find, enrich, and score qualified prospects using web research.
